taxonomy: Etubila maculata is a flowering plant, and according to various botanical sources, it belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The classification of Etubila maculata is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Eudicots, clade - Asterids, order - Gentianales, family - Rubiaceae, genus - Etubila, species - E. maculata. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as coffee or madder family. It contains over 600 genera and 13,000 species, many of which are economically important. The classification of Etubila maculata reflects its evolutionary relationship with other flowering plants within the Rubiaceae family.
